description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean white exterior walls and large rectangular windows. The structure is surrounded by a small landscaped yard with four distinct trees, adding greenery to the urban setting. The roof is primarily flat with a partial gable section, and there are multiple outdoor living spaces, including a patio and a deck area. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is slightly recessed, accessible by a short set of steps, and features a simple, modern door. The overall appearance is minimalist, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, white house with flat and gable roof sections, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings with trees and patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and three trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof section, rear deck, and a tree positioned near the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patio area, back door, and two trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof section, side patio, and a tree near the corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with short steps, no porch, minimalist modern style
